body.summary: All Phase 4 integration work complete. Pushed to GitHub + GitLab.
changes: Replaced claim_detail.html with v2 (batch scan UI integrated into main claim detail page)
Fixed ai_describe_photo() to use vision-capable model (gpt-4o-mini instead of text-only owl-alpha)
Fixed 3 other ow-alpha references in settings page and estimate generation
Added GET route for /customer/upload/<token> — was missing, caused 405 on link click
Fixed duplicate room_id column in batch_analyze INSERT statement
customer_upload.html complete with camera API, drag/drop, progress bar, token-based access
Batch analyze route: saves photos, runs _analyze_photo_vision(), stores detected_items + water_category/class
ai-populate route: creates line_items from AI analysis with 'ai_proposed' status
Generate upload link route: creates token, returns SMS-ready message with URL
files_changed: app.py (vision model fix, new GET route, INSERT bug fix)
templates/claim_detail.html (now v2 with batch scan section)
what_you_need_to_do: Pull latest from GitHub: git pull origin main
Verify the v2 claim_detail.html rendered correctly locally
Test the customer upload flow: generate-upload-link → open URL on phone → upload photos
If vision analysis gives issues, check OPENROUTER_API_KEY supports gpt-4o-mini
body.deployment: Pushed to GitHub origin/main — Railway should auto-deploy. Verify at floodclaims-production.up.railway.app (or your Railway URL).
